'''gachala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadometer|roadometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadometer|roadometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gachala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæchælæth|gæchælæth]] || [[word:gæchælæj|gæchælæj]] || [[word:gæchælæsh|gæchælæsh]] || [[word:gæchælæ|gæchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachachalath|gachachalath]] || [[word:gachachalaj|gachachalaj]] || [[word:gachachalash|gachachalash]] || [[word:gachachala|gachachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachalath|gachalath]] || [[word:gachalaj|gachalaj]] || [[word:gachalash|gachalash]] || [[word:gachala|gachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachaflath|gachaflath]] || [[word:gachaflaj|gachaflaj]] || [[word:gachaflash|gachaflash]] || [[word:gachaflaf|gachaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachalatha|gachalatha]] || [[word:gachalaja|gachalaja]] || [[word:gachalasha|gachalasha]] || [[word:gachalaka|gachalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachalath|gachalath]] || [[word:gachalaj|gachalaj]] || [[word:gachalash|gachalash]] || [[word:gachala|gachala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachalathal|gachalathal]] || [[word:gachalajal|gachalajal]] || [[word:gachalashal|gachalashal]] || [[word:gachalakal|gachalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachalathatha|gachalathatha]] || [[word:gachalajaja|gachalajaja]] || [[word:gachalashasha|gachalashasha]] || [[word:gachalaka|gachalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachalathan|gachalathan]] || [[word:gachalajan|gachalajan]] || [[word:gachalashan|gachalashan]] || [[word:gachalakan|gachalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachalathaoro|gachalathaoro]] || [[word:gachalajaoro|gachalajaoro]] || [[word:gachalashaoro|gachalashaoro]] || [[word:gachalakaoro|gachalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
